## ScreenShotPP v0.4.0-rc.2

Second release candidate for the "capture window that overflows the screen" feature.

### Change since rc.1

- The full-window (letterboxed) view now leaves a **margin around the image**,
  centered in the viewport, instead of touching the screen edges on a small monitor.

rc.1 already delivered the core feature. Note on the pre-selection dashed outline:
before you select, the overlay only exists on one monitor, so the outline can only
cover the on-screen part of a window that spans two monitors — the whole window is
shown once you select it (letterboxed view). This is a physical limit of the
single-monitor overlay.

Please re-test on Windows: overflow window → select it → whole window shown centered
with a margin; no regression on normal / drag / maximized captures.
